scripts.name: Rust No Recoil Script
scripts.description: Full no-recoil macro for all Rust weapons. Supports AK, LR300, MP5, SAR and more with pattern compensation.
scripts.longDescription: A complete no-recoil solution for Rust covering all major weapons. Each weapon has its own recoil pattern built in. Supports sensitivity adjustments, attachment detection, and crouch compensation. Lightweight and runs in the background.

scripts.name: Rust AK-47 Recoil Control
scripts.description: Precision AK-47 recoil script with full spray pattern. Adjustable DPI and sensitivity settings.
scripts.longDescription: Dedicated AK-47 recoil control script for Rust. Perfectly mapped spray pattern with adjustable DPI support from 400 to 3200. Includes burst mode and single shot toggle.

scripts.name: R6 Siege No Recoil Macro
scripts.description: Universal no-recoil macro for Rainbow Six Siege. Works with all operators and weapons.
scripts.longDescription: A universal no-recoil macro for R6 Siege compatible with all operators. Includes per-weapon profiles, attachment compensation, and rapid fire toggle. Updated for the latest season.

scripts.name: R6 Siege Triggerbot
scripts.description: Lightweight triggerbot for R6 Siege. Fires automatically when crosshair is on target. Configurable delay.
scripts.longDescription: A lightweight and configurable triggerbot for Rainbow Six Siege. Features adjustable trigger delay, toggle hotkey, and whitelist/blacklist for specific operators.

scripts.name: COD Warzone No Recoil
scripts.description: No recoil script for Warzone covering all meta weapons. Updated every season.
scripts.longDescription: Full no-recoil coverage for COD Warzone. Includes all current meta weapons with accurate spray patterns. Updated every season to match weapon balance changes. Supports multiple DPI profiles.

scripts.name: COD MW3 Rapid Fire Macro
scripts.description: Rapid fire macro for semi-auto weapons in MW3. Converts semi-auto to full-auto fire rate.
scripts.longDescription: Converts semi-automatic weapons to full-auto fire rate in MW3. Configurable fire rate, toggle on/off hotkey, and per-weapon profiles included.

scripts.name: Minecraft Auto Clicker
scripts.description: Lightweight auto clicker for Minecraft PvP. Randomized CPS to avoid detection. 8-20 CPS range.
scripts.longDescription: A Minecraft-specific auto clicker with human-like randomized CPS between 8 and 20. Includes jitter clicking simulation, toggle hotkey, and works with all PvP clients.

scripts.name: Minecraft Bridging Script
scripts.description: Auto bridging script for Minecraft. Supports god bridge, moonwalk, and breezily patterns.
scripts.longDescription: Automates advanced bridging techniques in Minecraft including god bridge, moonwalk bridge, and breezily bridge. Works on most PvP servers and clients.

scripts.name: Valorant No Recoil Script
scripts.description: No recoil macro for Valorant. Covers Vandal, Phantom, Spectre and more. Updated regularly.
scripts.longDescription: Accurate no-recoil scripts for Valorant's most used weapons. Vandal and Phantom patterns are pixel-perfect. Includes sensitivity calculator and DPI support.

scripts.name: Valorant Triggerbot
scripts.description: External triggerbot for Valorant. Pixel-based detection, no injection. Safe and lightweight.
scripts.longDescription: A pixel-based external triggerbot for Valorant that requires no game injection. Detects enemy color pixels and fires automatically. Fully configurable delay and toggle.

scripts.name: CS2 No Recoil Script
scripts.description: No recoil macro for CS2. AK-47, M4A4, M4A1-S, and more. Accurate spray patterns.
scripts.longDescription: Full no-recoil coverage for CS2 with accurate spray patterns for all major rifles and SMGs. Includes sensitivity and DPI adjustment, toggle hotkey, and burst mode.

scripts.name: CS2 Bhop Script
scripts.description: Bunny hop script for CS2. Auto-jump timing for consistent bhop on any server.
scripts.longDescription: Automates bunny hopping in CS2 with perfect jump timing. Works on most community servers. Includes scroll wheel simulation and spacebar mode.

scripts.name: Fortnite Build Macro
scripts.description: Fast build macro for Fortnite. 90s, box fights, and ramp rush automation.
scripts.longDescription: Automates common Fortnite building techniques including 90s, box fighting, and ramp rushes. Configurable keybinds to match your personal layout.
